response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as featuring Omaru Polka's birthday festival 2026. 2. Detected the first song as 'GIRLS' LEGEND U' at 00:00, with a group of VTubers performing. Found lyrics via search. 3. Detected a transition scene from 00:34 to 00:48. 4. Detected the second song 'STARTING OVER' performed by Omaru Polka starting at 00:48, with on-screen text identifying the composer and lyricist. 5. Could not find 'STARTING OVER' lyrics via search, so transcribed them from the video's on-screen text.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a performance of 'GIRLS' LEGEND U' by a group of virtual entertainers, followed by a solo performance of 'STARTING OVER' by Omaru Polka at her 2026 birthday festival.

scenes.description: A group of virtual entertainers perform the song 'GIRLS' LEGEND U' on a stage with bright lights. The song is sung in Japanese.

scenes.description: A transitional scene leading into the solo performance. The performer prepares on stage.
Omaru Polka performs her original song 'STARTING OVER'. Lyrics are displayed on screen. The song is sung in Japanese.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I could finally close the curtains
Until the very last moment
I gave it my all
I did everything I could

The continuation of the performance
Nobody needs to know
Leave the tears behind
Let's go on a new journey

Frenzy chooses you
It was just a different outcome
Destiny that couldn't become the same love

It was love that seemed to offer
Everything up until now
It felt like it was affirmed
To the point where the meaning of the world changed

In the nonchalance
The first miracle I noticed
I'm glad it was you
I'm glad it was me
I thought from the bottom of my heart

Let's remember even the far-off future properly
How to hold myself
How to wish for tomorrow

Even if you aren't here
In a corner of me
I know the gentle light
Will never fade

Now I can still wave my hand
The road has just separated
While feeling the wind in my hair from behind

Everything until then
Was to meet you
I knew in the true sense
That no moment was a waste

The next corner too
I should be able to choose with my own style
A new step
That leads to someday
Let's believe and start walking

I could love someone from my heart
Those days
Without a doubt were my Destiny

Everything until then
Gives me new strength
If no moment was a waste
Then no matter what happens, it's okay

The next story too
I should be able to choose with my own style
My beginning
That leads to someday
Let's believe and start walking
